title: Show HN: Hacker News on a train station-style flip board
summary: 一个基于火车站翻牌风格展示Hacker News内容的趣味项目，利用Firebase API实现实时更新。
translated_summary: A fun project displaying Hacker News content in a train station-style flip board, using Firebase API for real-time updates, built on the quickish vibe hosting service.
